introSection:
Batman The Ride is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Texas in Arlington, Texas, USA. It was designed by Bolliger & Mabillard.

Opened in 1999, the ride is the ninth Batman installation and the sixth at a Six Flags park.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On November 4, 1998, Six Flags Over Texas announced that Batman The Ride would debut in 1999. Testing of the ride began on April 27, 1999. On May 26, 1999, the ride opened.

During the 2014 season, the ride operated backwards.

Batman The Ride received a single rider line for the 2022 season.

The attraction was repainted in 2023.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Unlike the other locations, this Batman The Ride has a different station themed to the Wayne Foundation Industrial Park instead of Gotham Public Works.

fullText:
Batman The Ride is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Six Flags Over Texas in Arlington, Texas, USA. It was designed by Bolliger & Mabillard.

Opened in 1999, the ride is the ninth Batman installation and the sixth at a Six Flags park.

On November 4, 1998, Six Flags Over Texas announced that Batman The Ride would debut in 1999. Testing of the ride began on April 27, 1999. On May 26, 1999, the ride opened.

During the 2014 season, the ride operated backwards.

Batman The Ride received a single rider line for the 2022 season.

The attraction was repainted in 2023.

Unlike the other locations, this Batman The Ride has a different station themed to the Wayne Foundation Industrial Park instead of Gotham Public Works.

Yellow track and blue-grey supports.
